most_positive.title: $NVDA my puts were absolutely melted yesterday. Got some more ticking until tomorrow. This is my short-term hedge but I don’t complain as I have a 1000 shares averaged in the low 200s. This is the company of the future. I don’t really care much about short term. The infrastructure and vision this company has long term is just unmatched. Impossible to not be a bull over a 2-3 years time horizon. However, in the meanwhile, playing the swings is quite fun as it there is a very obvious market rotation that is somewhat predictable because markets became a casino and no longer chase fundamentals intraday
